THEVALKYRIE-OVEREXERT.title: Overexert
THEVALKYRIE-OVEREXERT.description: Overexertion deals damage to you if you fail to block all damage this turn.
THEVALKYRIE-BLEED.title: Bleed
THEVALKYRIE-BLEED.description: Bleeding creatures lose HP every time Bleed is applied. Each turn, Bleed is reduced by 1.
THEVALKYRIE-ARMOR.title: Armor
THEVALKYRIE-ARMOR.description: Armor lowers damage taken from all attacks, before Block.
THEVALKYRIE-BLESS.title: Bless
THEVALKYRIE-BLESS.description: Blessing makes most [purple]Enchantments[/purple] stronger. If not specified, Blessing an unenchanted card gives it a random blessable enchantment.
THEVALKYRIE-HATCH_FROM_NEST.title: Hatch from the Nest
THEVALKYRIE-HATCH_FROM_NEST.description:
On the first hatch, gain the card [gold]Byrd Swoop[/gold].
On the second hatch, gain the card [gold]Peck[/gold], and you start each combat with [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Byrd Strength[/gold].
On the third hatch, start every fight with an Upgraded [gold]Abnormal Instincts[/gold] in your hand, and your [gold]Abnormal Instincts[/gold] cards cost 1 less.
